## Meeting Purpose

[Hiring manager screen for Will Ruzvidzo for the Technical Managing Editor role at growthx.ai](https://fathom.video/share/AccVHEqsigQJoxaYs5kz4fXJDGn2B3bx?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Will has 10 years of content marketing experience, primarily in tech and SaaS, with a strong background in AI-assisted content creation](https://fathom.video/share/AccVHEqsigQJoxaYs5kz4fXJDGn2B3bx?tab=summary&timestamp=193.0)
  - [GrowthX differentiates itself by building proprietary tools and aiming to articulate and productize complex business processes](https://fathom.video/share/AccVHEqsigQJoxaYs5kz4fXJDGn2B3bx?tab=summary&timestamp=1423.0)
  - [The role requires adaptability to elastic workloads and the ability to balance client delivery with product improvement](https://fathom.video/share/AccVHEqsigQJoxaYs5kz4fXJDGn2B3bx?tab=summary&timestamp=1798.0)

## Topics

### Will's Background and Experience

  - [10 years in content marketing, balancing freelance and agency work](https://fathom.video/share/AccVHEqsigQJoxaYs5kz4fXJDGn2B3bx?tab=summary&timestamp=193.0)
  - [Specialized in tech space, B2B and B2C SaaS companies for the past 5 years](https://fathom.video/share/AccVHEqsigQJoxaYs5kz4fXJDGn2B3bx?tab=summary&timestamp=211.0)
  - [Worked at Animals content marketing agency with a rigorous writing process](https://fathom.video/share/AccVHEqsigQJoxaYs5kz4fXJDGn2B3bx?tab=summary&timestamp=239.0)
  - [Transitioned to embracing AI tools for content creation (e.g., Writer platform)](https://fathom.video/share/AccVHEqsigQJoxaYs5kz4fXJDGn2B3bx?tab=summary&timestamp=305.0)
  - [Developed skills in building AI agents and workflows (e.g., Make.com, N18, MindStudio)](https://fathom.video/share/AccVHEqsigQJoxaYs5kz4fXJDGn2B3bx?tab=summary&timestamp=406.0)

### AI-Assisted Content Creation Process

  - [Uses editorial writing guidelines and branding/tone of voice instructions for AI](https://fathom.video/share/AccVHEqsigQJoxaYs5kz4fXJDGn2B3bx?tab=summary&timestamp=545.0)
  - [Collaborates with AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude) through iterative feedback](https://fathom.video/share/AccVHEqsigQJoxaYs5kz4fXJDGn2B3bx?tab=summary&timestamp=598.0)
  - [Maintains a checklist for final quality control](https://fathom.video/share/AccVHEqsigQJoxaYs5kz4fXJDGn2B3bx?tab=summary&timestamp=636.0)
  - [Created a custom AI agent through MindStudio for article checks](https://fathom.video/share/AccVHEqsigQJoxaYs5kz4fXJDGn2B3bx?tab=summary&timestamp=728.0)

### Client Management Experience

  - [Direct client interaction as a freelancer (e.g., impact.com, Writer)](https://fathom.video/share/AccVHEqsigQJoxaYs5kz4fXJDGn2B3bx?tab=summary&timestamp=1044.0)
  - [Experience in presenting reports, pitches, and outlines to clients](https://fathom.video/share/AccVHEqsigQJoxaYs5kz4fXJDGn2B3bx?tab=summary&timestamp=1077.0)
  - [Emphasis on being a strategic partner, not just a content producer](https://fathom.video/share/AccVHEqsigQJoxaYs5kz4fXJDGn2B3bx?tab=summary&timestamp=1318.0)

### GrowthX's Unique Approach

  - [Builds proprietary tools instead of relying on external patchwork solutions](https://fathom.video/share/AccVHEqsigQJoxaYs5kz4fXJDGn2B3bx?tab=summary&timestamp=1424.0)
  - [Uses client work as ground truth for articulating and productizing business processes](https://fathom.video/share/AccVHEqsigQJoxaYs5kz4fXJDGn2B3bx?tab=summary&timestamp=1545.0)
  - [Aims to expand beyond content to other business functions (e.g., sales, marketing, HR)](https://fathom.video/share/AccVHEqsigQJoxaYs5kz4fXJDGn2B3bx?tab=summary&timestamp=1705.0)
  - [Focuses on articulating the "messy middle" of complex processes](https://fathom.video/share/AccVHEqsigQJoxaYs5kz4fXJDGn2B3bx?tab=summary&timestamp=1727.0)

### Role Challenges and Expectations

  - [Elastic workload due to evolving product capabilities and client demands](https://fathom.video/share/AccVHEqsigQJoxaYs5kz4fXJDGn2B3bx?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)
  - [Need for adaptability and comfort with sometimes overextended capacity](https://fathom.video/share/AccVHEqsigQJoxaYs5kz4fXJDGn2B3bx?tab=summary&timestamp=1936.0)
  - [Opportunity to influence product direction through direct feedback](https://fathom.video/share/AccVHEqsigQJoxaYs5kz4fXJDGn2B3bx?tab=summary&timestamp=1980.0)
  - [Success measured by client satisfaction, content delivery, and ability to create buffer for process improvements](https://fathom.video/share/AccVHEqsigQJoxaYs5kz4fXJDGn2B3bx?tab=summary&timestamp=2033.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marilia will reach out with next steps in the hiring process](https://fathom.video/share/AccVHEqsigQJoxaYs5kz4fXJDGn2B3bx?tab=summary&timestamp=2227.0)
  - [Will to consider the elastic nature of the role and startup environment](https://fathom.video/share/AccVHEqsigQJoxaYs5kz4fXJDGn2B3bx?tab=summary&timestamp=2001.0)
  - [GrowthX to evaluate Will's fit based on his AI experience and client management skills](https://fathom.video/share/AccVHEqsigQJoxaYs5kz4fXJDGn2B3bx?tab=summary&timestamp=2033.0)
